review_title: Great for beginners who are just starting out
description: My overall experience with Weebly was great when I first started out because of the low cost, the ease of setup and to establish an online presence. It did a great job!
author: Kate E.
pros: Great for when I first got started in e-commerce. Very easy to set up, it was free, and easy interface.
cons: They need to add some more templates.Outdated templates.

review_title: Great starting point for a small business’s website
author: Jacob B.
pros: It is a great starter website builder, especially if you have a small store with a limited inventory
cons: Once you start adding a lot of customization to your website, the experience goes downhill quickly and then you have to migrate your whole site.

review_title: Loyalty accounts for NOTHING
description: After over 10 yrs hosting my website I… After over 10 yrs hosting my website I get 4x the regular fee taken out of my bank. No explanation. After months of trying to get an answer I cancelled and got lame excuses why they ‘upgraded’ me and charged me 4x more. They said they’d give a refund and did not. The replies were somewhat arrogant too, AVOID
author: Matt W.
pros: Not much. It was easy initially to setup but is very old tech now. Much better alternatives available
cons: They have bad customer service and after over ten years they overcharged me by 4x without reason or consultation. I’ve cancelled!!

review_title: Weebly review
author: Simranjit K.
pros: It is very easy to use, from students to seniors can use it to some capcity. It provides great templates to jumpstart and all process is smooth
cons: For basic use it is good but lacks customizable features, also there are few bugs and lags that can be improved

review_title: Reliable, easy to use and lots of features (for free!)
description: I've used weebly for over 10 years and it's my go-to every time I want to develop a new site without having to do any coding etc
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's super easy to use, and has great features, some of which I haven't seen elsewhere. The customer support is also great and they allow you to use your own .weebly.com domain for free!
cons: No student discounts yet, but they are very generous and will help you. It would be nice to have a free trial of some sorts .

review_title: Weebly: An All-in-one SEO, eCommerce and Website Builder of All Times
description: With Weebly, I have been able to create stunning websites without coding and hosting them at an affordable price.
author: Bailey U.
pros: Weebly allocates a wide array of website builder and eCommerce tools in one space. It only involves drag-and-drop to create and design websites without coding. Availability of built-in SEO services is another great aspect that I like most about Weebly.
cons: Weebly rarely pose bugs on my end while creating and designing websites and landing pages.

review_title: Easy to use but needs some new features to make it more up to date
description: I still use weebly for one website but its limitations mean I have my main website with another website builder.
author: Steven B.
pros: It is very easy to use and simple to understand.
cons: It is a bit buggy these days and doesn’t seem to have any new features

review_title: Weebly - highly recommended
description: I've been using weebly for over 6 years for 3 different websites and it's great - I can great dynamic, aesthetic, and unique sites easily with this software.
author: Ewa H.
pros: It's easy to use, even for a beginner. I can create great looking websites, format photos and text easily, embed code and widgets, and customize everything I need to.
cons: If a photo has the same name and another photo you've used, it may display the correct photo on the builder but the wrong photo on the live web site.

review_title: Laying a Strong Foundation with unique software, Weebly.
description: Easy to use and customize. Has powerful security features too.
author: Peter M.
pros: Weebly starts with key fundamentals like site layout, navigation and text. New layout styles gives us the flexibility to show off our items in a variety of ways.
cons: Weebly expertly and consistently give a satisfying experience. Nothing serious worth highlighting.

review_title: There are no real advantages to using Weebly
description: Overall Weebly was a good introduction to web design but I wouldn't recommend anyone using it long term. Play around with it if you must. But there are so many better alternatives - your time would be better spent learning to build on WP.
author: Lois O.
pros: It's relatively easy to use for someone who's never built a website before. Also, the pricing is budget-friendly.
cons: It feels really clunky and old fashioned.. it's so glitchy. Often doing something simple like adding a header takes 1-2 minutes. It's just not worth the hassle compared to other web builders. Also the ability to customize the designs is really limited and the support is total rubbish, don't even bother trying to contact them.

review_title: Weebly solid web tool great value
description: Positive a very good web builder - easy to use easy to customize a page lay out also its better than wordpress - easier to use,
author: marvin D.
pros: used weebly for 8 years it was a great web platform for me
cons: inetegrations were limited - dasboard was just ok

review_title: Love it! So simple and easy!!
description: great. both as a user who has built a website and as someone who has used weebly sites made by others
author: Crimson S.
pros: the ease of use makes it quick and simple to build a website
cons: it is a little confusing to use at first but once i got the hang of it it made things quick
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Weebly makes websites easy
description: I can’t picture making my personal website with any other builder.
author: Joshua D.
pros: It has been easy to use and consistent for years, and lets me design my website as I like it without coding.
cons: Since its purchase by Square, it’s become difficult to login.

review_title: A good affordable and quick to set up web-builder
description: Weebly got us started in no time, and our web presence was almost immediate. Their service was very affordable and, as a small school, it was more than welcome. We received compliments from the community for the quality of our school website.
author: Lawrent M.
pros: Weebly allows you to quickly be present on the web thanks to its -although limited- templates, and ease of use. You can customize your website to your liking and navigate through the SEO quite easily. I liked the fact that you can add contributors with limited control. We had to resort to contacting the support team, and they always answered in a timely and efficient manner.
cons: There are fewer templates than in WIX, which is essential as I didn't want to spend too much time customizing the website. Starting with something closer to what we wanted was a priority.

review_title: Weekly is my absolute favorite!
description: This is my absolute favorite blog site! Other sites like blogger are super difficult to use, but with weekly you don’t have to know much about editing as they provide the tools for you! Plus side is that you don’t really have to be premium, I use the free version and my storytelling needs were met.
author: Autumn P.
pros: Beginner friendly Lots of free templates No purchase necessary you get most features free! Easy to edit and customize
cons: Getting in contact with customer support is tricky Recovering lost account was nearly impossible

review_title: Best for Personal Use
description: It is effective to use among small groups and allows for information to be easily stored and accessed, though it is hard to have an attractive design.
author: Octavia T.
pros: The interface is easy to navigate. It allows you to quickly create a website for personal or professional use.
cons: While the interface is easy to navigate, it is difficult to create a sleek and modern design using the platform. It would be difficult for an organization to make a very attractive website using this platform.

review_title: Weebly Website Builder
author: Ashleigh H.
pros: Ease of use to navigate between pages. Edit, remove, and add items with easily. Not too expensive to get a starter site for a business going
cons: The different options to arrange pictures, sometime they don't end up where you want them or they load to the site in a different size.

review_title: Easy to use!
author: peter R.
pros: loved the drag and drop tools and professional designs. it was simple to make a professional looking website but had all the tools I needed.
cons: some of the watermarks and .Weebly web addresses can be frustrating for new users or those using the free version.

review_title: Weebly is Great Setting Up Your Own Professional Looking Website
description: I used Weebly to set up a small business website as an alternative/ supplement to my online handmade shop using another popular platform which had a lot of fees associated with it.
author: Cheryl C.
pros: I like that Weebly is a step by step process that is easy to use and understand to set up my small business website. There are many themes to choose from.
cons: There is a little difficulty switching back and forth to the mobile application.

review_title: Stream lines my business uploads
description: Love it. I am so happy that they have an app that I was able to install from the Apple Store.
author: Timmy W.
pros: Being able to run my website from my iPad is HUGE! Such an easy program to use with Square. They knocked this out of the park.
cons: I have not ran into anything that I do not like yet. I have been using the app for about a month at the time of this review.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ticketing Agent Views on Weebly Platform
description: Search engine optimization for our website is the main benefit.
author: Adegboyega A.
pros: Availability of robust eCommerce features which makes it easy to set online stores is what I like most about Weebly.
cons: Even though pricing range from $10, some products such as domains are quite expensive.

review_title: Weebly for the win!
description: My overall experience has been great and truly don't have any complaints.
author: Victoria P.
pros: I like Weebly but I wish it was a little more user friendly. I am not great at website design so it may be a user issue!
cons: Wish they offered more up to date tutorials to help.

review_title: Weebly for Web-building Newbies and for Experienced Coders
description: Overall, this is very good for what we need. As previously stated, there are a couple of glitchy features that don't work properly, but there is plenty of good to overrule those problematic areas.
author: Vicki L.
pros: As an experienced web developer, I was concerned that Weebly would be too generic for our needs and wouldn't allow us to build more detailed web pages in the cases where we would need them. But they proved me wrong. Weebly makes building and maintaining your site easy to do when it comes to the ho-hum aspects of web development, and then it lets you ramp things up when you need to with it's Embed Code feature. Overall, we are extremely pleased with Weebly. There are a few things that are glitchy or don't work reliably, but those items are minor compared to the overall skillset this software has.
cons: The ability to create links to other web sites is glitchy. It doesn't work reliably and may take 2-3 tries before I can get it to work properly. The other feature that doesn't work is their Search component. It's supposed to allow users of our site to be able to search our entire side for keywords, but currently, this feature does not work. I've contacted customer support about it and they did not really give me a satisfactory response. They have no idea when or if that Search element will be fixed.

review_title: Weebly Website Creation
description: The intuitive and user friendly interface makes it so easy to use even for beginners.
author: John C.
pros: Weebly is the perfect tool for creating stunning visuals quickly and easily. I've been using it to create images for my blog posts and website and it's incredibly intuitive - anyone can pick it up in no time. see my website www.seetavacation.com
cons: Some basic tools are free but the good stuff cost money, you have to pay extra

review_title: A very helpful, easy and affordable website builder.
description: Weebly was one of the software that I started using in building websites for my business. It is just what people with limited technical skills need when it comes to manifesting their business online. I found it very easy to use and versatile. However over the years it has become outdated and in order to keep up with prevailing trends, I had to migrate to other software such as Wix .
author: Mashudu Hilary M.
pros: The first and most attractive feature that I found on Weebly is how it provides a generous free plan. I found it to provide a satisfactory array of features. The user interface is highly reliable and offers an option to drag and drop new elements on a page which you can click to edit settings. Weebly offers a wide selection and flexibility of design templates together with stylish themes with different page layouts for different uses. I love how it offers unlimited levels of navigation hierarchy and on top of this, the software supports large site structures. Weebly is also convenient in that image galleries, video and music players and other gadgets are all included in the editor. In addition to this, there are a number of useful applications such as tables, calendars and social media widgets and it allows the use of external widgets and tools which is highly advantageous. Lastly, Weebly offers excellent support be it chat or email. The softwares knowledge base answers a lot of questions through comprehensible tutorials and step by step guides.
cons: Over the years, there haven't been many if not any updates, no new templates have been added in a while to the software thus making it outdated. The software offers limited customization and I have found the classic editor to be quite laggy. In spite of the software coming in a number of languages, non English characters are not supported. Lastly, I really believe that an undo button would be very useful as there is no way to recover deleted content such as text and images.
